nasb.text: Jesus answered, “Are you saying this on your own initiative, or did others tell you about Me?”

esv.text: Jesus answered, “Do you say this of your own accord, or did others say it to you about me?”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“這話是你自己說的，還是別人對你說到我的呢？”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“你这样问是你自己的意思还是听别人说的？”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答：“这话是你自己说的，还是别人告诉过你关于我的事呢？”
